calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La, via ZOOM, for Carlos Valdivia, Administrator.

The court at the outset confirms with Ms. La that there are no objections. The court then reminds counsel that moving forward, to confirm that pleadings have been filed prior to sending notice. The court then confirms with Ms. La that none of the heirs have been previously incarcerated.

The Accounting petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Saephan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Continued To Sep-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-27-2021 Continued To Aug-24-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Reformation Of Deed
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La, via ZOOM, counsel for Carlos Valdivia, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court comments as to Ms. Trang's lack of reference to probate codes in her petition, specifically, probate code 850.

After additional discussion, the court takes the Petition for Reformation of Deed under submission, with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2020 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
